blog.featured_image_type_error: Choose a JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP image.
blog.meta_desc_desc: Appears as the snippet in search results. Leave blank to use excerpt.
blog.meta_title_desc: Overrides the page title in search results. Leave blank to use post title.
blog.noindex_desc: Prevent search engines from indexing this post
blog.placeholder_excerpt: A short summary of the post
blog.placeholder_meta_desc: Custom description for search engine results
blog.placeholder_meta_title: Custom tab title for search engines
blog.slug_desc_create: Auto-generated from title, or type a custom slug.
blog.slug_desc_edit: Edit to customize the URL. Leave as-is to keep current slug.

content.max_menus_desc: Maximum number of custom menus allowed for this plan

federation.activity_feed_desc: A timeline of everything that has happened with your partner timebanks — messages, exchanges, shared listings and partnership changes.
federation.allow_inbound_partnerships_desc: When this is on, other timebanks can ask to partner with your community. You still review and approve each request yourself — unless automatic approval is switched on below.
federation.api_docs_desc: Developer reference explaining federation authentication, protocol endpoints, examples, errors, and webhooks
federation.api_keys_desc: Keys your timebank uses to prove who it is when it connects to partner timebanks and other trusted systems.
federation.auto_approve_partners_desc: When this is on, partnership requests from other timebanks are accepted straight away, without anyone checking them first. Most communities leave this off so a coordinator reviews each request.
federation.balance_negative_desc: This community owes time credits to its partner
federation.balance_positive_desc: This community has a positive balance with its partner
federation.confirm_revoke: The system using this key will lose access immediately. This cannot be undone.
federation.counter_propose_desc: Not ready to accept as-is? Choose the partnership level and what members can share, then send it back for the other timebank to review.
federation.create_api_key_desc: Create an outgoing key for a trusted federation workflow or partner timebank protocol request
federation.credit_agreements_desc: Manage settlement rules for trusted partner timebanks that are allowed to exchange time credits
federation.data_management_desc: Export tenant-scoped Federation records, import supported partner records, and purge old logs.
federation.delete_partner_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this partner? This cannot be undone.
federation.desc_a_brief_description_of_your_communi: A brief description of your community for federation partners
federation.desc_create_an_a_p_i_key_to_enable_feder: Create an API key to enable federation integration
federation.desc_maximum_credits_that_can_be_exchang: Maximum credits that can be exchanged per month in federation agreements
federation.desc_no_federation_partnerships_have_bee: You haven't partnered with any other timebanks yet. Browse the partner directory to find communities to connect with.
federation.desc_public_contact_email_shown_to_partn: Public contact email shown to partner communities
federation.desc_the_public_name_of_your_community_i: The public name of your community in the federation network
federation.enable_from_tenant_features: Turn it on under Tenant Features to start partnering with other timebanks
federation.external_partners_desc: Connect this timebank to partners that run other software, such as NEXUS, TimeOverflow, Komunitin, or Credit Commons. Each connection lets the two systems work together.
federation.failed_to_create_a_p_i_key_please_try_ag: Failed to create API key. Please try again
federation.key_create_failed: Failed to create API key. Please try again.
federation.federation_analytics_desc: View analytics for cross-community activity and partnership health
federation.federation_enabled_desc: The master switch. Turn this on to let your community connect with partner timebanks. Other timebanks in the network may see your community's name, but nothing else is shared until you approve a partnership.
federation.federation_settings_desc: Decide whether this community can partner with other timebanks, who can send you partnership requests, and how many partners you can have.
federation.jwt_federation_auth_platform_intro: Most partners connect using keys you set up for each partner in
federation.jwt_federation_auth_platform_middle: and need no platform setup. If a partner specifically requires JWT auth, the platform super-admin must set
federation.jwt_federation_auth_platform_suffix: in the server environment. Status and setup instructions live under
federation.jwt_federation_auth_platform_title: JWT partner sign-in is set up by the platform operator
federation.import_users_desc: Import users from a partner community via CSV
federation.max_partnerships_desc: The most partner timebanks your community can be connected with at the same time.
federation.my_profile_desc: Configure how your community appears to other communities in the federation
federation.public_contact_email_desc: Public contact email shown to partner communities
federation.neighborhoods_desc: Manage neighborhood clusters that group related communities together
federation.no_activity_desc: Nothing has happened with your partner timebanks yet. Once partnerships are active, their activity will show up here.
federation.no_api_keys_desc: You only need a key when connecting your timebank to a partner timebank or another trusted system. Create one when a partner asks for it.
federation.no_neighborhoods_desc: No neighborhoods have been created yet
federation.not_enabled_for_tenant: Partnering is not switched on for this community
federation.partner_directory_desc: Browse the directory of communities available to partner with
federation.partnership_message_placeholder: Optional message to the partner community...
federation.partnership_request_description: Ask this timebank to partner with yours. Their coordinators can accept, decline, or suggest different terms.
federation.partnerships_desc: See who you're partnered with and respond to new partnership requests
federation.permissions_editable_when_active: Permissions are editable when the partnership is active
federation.placeholder_counter_message: Explain why you're suggesting different terms (optional)...
federation.placeholder_optional_description_of_this: Optional Description of This Neighborhood Cluster...
federation.suspend_agreement_confirm: Are you sure you want to suspend this agreement?
federation.terminate_agreement_confirm: This permanently ends your credit agreement with {{name}}. No more time credits can be exchanged under it, and it cannot be switched back on. This cannot be undone.
federation.terminate_partnership_confirm: End this partnership? Members will lose access to each other's profiles, messages, and exchanges. This cannot be undone.
federation.webhooks_created_no_secret: Webhook created — no signing secret was generated
federation.webhooks_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this webhook?
federation.webhooks_desc: Let a partner's system get notified automatically the moment something happens in your timebank, such as a new message or a completed exchange.
federation.webhooks_events_required: At least one event type must be selected
federation.webhooks_secret_warning: Store this secret securely — it will not be shown again
federation.webhooks_url_hint: The endpoint URL that will receive webhook events
federation.api_doc_api_key_desc: Bearer-token access for partner API calls.
federation.api_doc_api_key_instructions: Include your API key in the Authorization header as a Bearer token. Keys can be created and managed on the API Keys page.
federation.api_doc_api_key_plain_intro: An API key is a very long password. When you federate with another timebank, you give them an API key and they give you one. Whenever their platform needs to ask yours a question, it sends the key along so yours knows the request is genuine.
federation.api_doc_api_key_plain_scope: Keys are revocable and scoped, so you can revoke access or limit a key to read-only permissions.
federation.api_doc_api_key_scopes: Each key has scoped permissions (e.g. timebanks:read, messages:write). Requests requiring a scope your key does not have will return 403 Forbidden.
federation.api_doc_error_bad_request_desc: The request body is malformed or missing required fields. Check the validation error message for details.
federation.api_doc_error_conflict_desc: The request conflicts with the current state, such as a duplicate transaction or existing opt-in.
federation.api_doc_error_forbidden_desc: Your API key does not have the required permission scope, or the target resource is restricted.
federation.api_doc_error_format_intro: All error responses follow a consistent JSON format:
federation.api_doc_error_internal_desc: An unexpected error occurred. Contact support if the issue persists.
federation.api_doc_error_not_found_desc: The requested resource does not exist, or the member or listing is not accessible via federation.
federation.api_doc_error_rate_limited_desc: Too many requests. Check the rate-limit reset header for when to retry.
federation.api_doc_error_unauthorized_desc: Missing, invalid, or expired authentication credentials. Ensure your API key or JWT is valid.
federation.api_doc_example_api_key: Example: reading data with an API key
federation.api_doc_example_message: Example: sending a message to a partner member
federation.api_doc_hmac_desc: Request signatures for tamper-resistant partner calls.
federation.api_doc_header_nonce_desc: Unique random string per request. Prevents replay attacks.
federation.api_doc_header_platform_id_desc: Your platform identifier, taken from the key prefix of your API key.
federation.api_doc_header_signature_desc: HMAC-SHA256 hex digest of the string to sign using your API secret.
federation.api_doc_header_timestamp_desc: Unix timestamp in seconds. Requests older than 5 minutes are rejected.
federation.api_doc_hmac_instructions: Sign every request using your API secret. The signature proves the request has not been tampered with in transit.
federation.api_doc_jwt_desc: Short-lived token access for server-to-server integrations.
federation.api_doc_jwt_instructions: Exchange your API key for a short-lived JWT via the token endpoint. Include it as a Bearer token. JWTs expire after 1 hour.
federation.api_doc_payload_format_desc: Every webhook delivery includes these standard fields:
federation.api_doc_rate_limit_instructions: All API responses include rate-limit headers. When the limit is exceeded, responses return 429 Too Many Requests.
federation.api_doc_rate_limit_limit_desc: Maximum requests per window, defaulting to 60 per minute.
federation.api_doc_rate_limit_remaining_desc: Requests remaining in the current window.
federation.api_doc_rate_limit_reset_desc: Unix timestamp when the window resets.
federation.api_doc_signature_verification_desc: Every webhook delivery is signed with your webhook secret using HMAC-SHA256. Verify the signature to ensure the payload is authentic and has not been tampered with. The signature is sent in the
federation.api_doc_string_to_sign_desc: Concatenate the HTTP method, full URL path, Unix timestamp, and raw request body. Use an empty string for GET requests with no body, and separate each part with a newline character.
federation.api_doc_webhook_events_desc: Everything that can trigger an automatic notification to a partner system.
federation.api_doc_webhook_delivery_intro: Webhooks are sent as POST requests to your configured HTTPS endpoint. Configure webhooks on the
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_connection_request: A cross-timebank connection request was sent
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_listing_shared: A listing was shared to the federation network
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_member_opted_in: A member opted in to federation
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_member_opted_out: A member opted out of federation
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_message_received: A federated message was received by a member in your timebank
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_message_sent: A federated message was sent from your timebank
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_partnership_reques: A new partnership request was sent to your timebank
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_transaction_comple: A time credit transaction was completed
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_transaction_create: A time credit transaction was initiated
federation.api_doc_webhook_plain_intro: A webhook is a notification sent when something happens on your side that the other side needs to know about right away, such as a cancelled transfer or a new message.
federation.api_doc_webhook_signed: Every webhook is signed. Forgeries are rejected automatically.
federation.api_doc_federation_agreement: Both sides must agree before the bridge opens, and either side can close it at any time.
federation.api_doc_federation_intro: Federation lets your timebank talk to another timebank. Once the connection is open, members can send time credits, message each other, see each other's listings, and leave reviews across the bridge.
federation.api_doc_overview_title: Start here - federation in plain English
federation.api_doc_rule_of_thumb: Rule of thumb: API keys handle requests you make on purpose. Webhooks handle surprises you need to know about without asking.
federation.api_doc_safeguard_duplicate_webhook: Unique IDs and nonces. Duplicates are ignored.
federation.api_doc_safeguard_fake_webhook: Every webhook is signed. Fakes are rejected automatically.
federation.api_doc_safeguard_global_trust: A platform-wide kill switch in super-admin disables federation everywhere instantly.
federation.api_doc_safeguard_partner_down: Queued delivery with retries. Circuit breakers stop repeated calls to an offline partner.
federation.api_doc_safeguard_partner_misbehaves: Per-partner rate limits, per-feature kill switches, and one-click suspension.
federation.api_doc_safeguard_stolen_key: Revoke in one click. Create a new key in seconds.
federation.api_doc_safeguards_title: What could go wrong? (and what we do about it)
federation.api_doc_scenario_receiving_messages: Receiving messages from the other side
federation.api_doc_scenario_transfer_cancelled: Being told a transfer you sent was cancelled
federation.api_doc_setup_step_agree: Both admins agree to federate. Nothing starts without both sides saying yes.
federation.api_doc_setup_step_features: Turn on the features you want to share, starting with the safest options.
federation.api_doc_setup_step_handshake: Test the handshake. One click sends a test request, and green means it is working.
federation.api_doc_setup_step_keys: Exchange API keys. Paste theirs into External Protocol Partners and keep yours safe.
federation.api_doc_setup_step_partner: Find a partner running compatible federation software.
federation.api_doc_setup_step_webhooks: Exchange webhook URLs if you want real-time events.
federation.api_doc_setup_title: How do I set up a connection? (6 steps)
federation.api_doc_summary_body: Federation is two timebanks agreeing to act as one network. API keys let them ask each other questions. Webhooks notify the other side when something urgent happens. Everything is signed, revocable, and off by default until both sides say yes.
federation.api_doc_technical_tabs_hint: Ready for the technical detail? Use the other tabs above: Authentication, Endpoints, Examples, Error Codes, and Webhooks.
federation.api_doc_worry_fake_webhook: A partner sends a fake webhook
federation.api_doc_worry_global_trust: We lose trust in federation entirely
federation.api_doc_worry_partner_misbehaves: A partner misbehaves with spam or fraud
federation.cc_config_desc: Set up how this timebank joins the Credit Commons network — its name in the network, the hub it connects through, and how its hours convert
federation.cc_config_load_failed: Failed to load Credit Commons configuration
federation.cc_config_save_failed: Failed to save Credit Commons configuration
federation.cc_currency_format_desc: How amounts are displayed. Use <quantity> as placeholder.
federation.cc_exchange_rate_desc: Exchange rate relative to parent node. 1.0 = same unit.
federation.cc_node_slug_desc: Your timebank's unique short name in the Credit Commons network. Use 3-15 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens.
federation.cc_node_slug_invalid: Node slug must be 3-15 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
federation.cc_parent_url_desc: The web address of the Credit Commons hub this timebank connects through. Leave empty if this timebank is not connected to a hub.
federation.cc_validated_window_desc: How long a validated transaction stays valid before auto-expiring. Default: 300 (5 minutes).
federation.confirm_approve_partnership: Approve this partnership? Members of both timebanks will be able to see and interact with each other, based on the sharing permissions you set.
federation.confirm_delete_neighborhood: Are you sure you want to delete neighborhood?
federation.confirm_purge_body: This permanently deletes old federation audit and API log entries outside the retention window.
federation.confirm_reject_partnership: Reject this request? The other timebank will be notified. You can still partner with them later if things change.
federation.confirm_remove_tenant: Are you sure you want to remove tenant?
federation.export_all_desc: Download a tenant-scoped JSON archive of Federation configuration, partner records, member settings, messages, connections, internal transactions, directory profile, neighbourhoods, credit agreements, reputation records, and logs.
federation.export_item_internal_activity: Member settings, messages, connections, internal transactions, directory profile, neighbourhoods, and credit agreements
federation.export_loaded_only: Includes only the entries loaded below
federation.export_secrets_note: API keys and signing secrets are redacted.
federation.import_desc: Restores partnerships and external partner records from a Federation JSON export. Use dry-run before committing.
federation.import_dry_run_hint: Validates the file and reports what would change without writing records.
federation.protocol_type_desc: Choose the software the partner timebank runs. The right technical settings are filled in for you.
federation.purge_desc: Delete federation audit and API log entries older than the selected retention window.
federation.reactivate_partnership_confirm: Reactivate this partnership? Members of both timebanks will regain access to each other.
federation.webhooks_sample_message: This is a test delivery from Project NEXUS Federation
federation.webhooks_test_note: This is sample data only. Nothing real is sent and no members are affected.
federation.webhooks_test_preview_desc: This sends a harmless test notification to the address below so you can check the connection works. No real member data is included.

analytics.description: See how much is happening with your partner timebanks and whether the connections are healthy.
analytics.title: Federation Analytics

federation.no_external_partners_hint: Connect a partner timebank that runs NEXUS, TimeOverflow, Komunitin, or Credit Commons to start working together.
federation.no_logs_hint: Activity will appear here once this connection is used. Run a connection check to create the first entry.
federation.cc_standalone_note: Not connected to a hub yet. This timebank works on its own until you enter a hub address.
federation.level_desc_discovery: The two timebanks can find each other in the directory. Members can't interact yet.
federation.level_desc_social: Members can see each other's profiles and send messages between the two timebanks.
federation.level_desc_economic: Members can also exchange time credits and respond to each other's offers and requests.
federation.level_desc_integrated: Full partnership — members can also share events and groups across both timebanks.
federation.permission_desc_profiles: Members of both timebanks can see each other's profiles
federation.permission_desc_messaging: Members can send messages to each other
federation.permission_desc_transactions: Members can exchange time credits with each other
federation.permission_desc_listings: Members can see each other's offers and requests
federation.permission_desc_events: Members can see and join each other's events
federation.permission_desc_groups: Members can see and join each other's groups
federation.webhooks_empty_hint: Add one to notify a partner's system automatically when something happens in your timebank.
federation.webhooks_no_logs_hint: Deliveries will appear here once this webhook starts sending notifications.
federation.rotate_secret_confirm_body: A new signing key is created immediately and the old one stops working. Partner timebanks that check your shared statistics will see errors until you give them the new key. The old key cannot be recovered.
federation.no_credit_agreements_hint: Create an agreement to start exchanging time credits with a partner timebank.
federation.no_balances_hint: Balances appear here once time credits start moving between you and a partner timebank.

resources.resources_admin_desc: View and manage resource listings shared by community members
resources.delete_category_confirm: Delete the category "{{name}}"? Resources assigned to it may become uncategorised.
resources.drop_file: Drop a file here or click to browse
resources.markdown_desc: Raw markdown - will be rendered on the public page.
resources.name: Name
resources.placeholder_excerpt: A short summary of the article (optional)
resources.publish_desc: Published articles are visible to all users
resources.sort_order_desc: Lower numbers appear first. Default is 0.
resources.excerpt_desc: A short summary shown in article lists and search results.
resources.video_url_desc: Optional. A YouTube or Vimeo URL embedded at the top of the article.
resources.resources_admin_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.
resources.attachment_delete_confirm: Delete this attachment? This cannot be undone.
